name: fiserv-woocommerce-devtools
description: Dev scripts for WooCommerce Fiserv plugin Docker environment.

scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down && docker volume rm fisrv-woocommerce-plugin_wordpress_data fisrv-woocommerce-plugin_db_data && docker compose up -d
scripts.php-cs-fix: docker compose run --rm composer php vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix --config=/app/.php-cs-fixer.php --dry-run --diff -v --using-cache=no > php-cs-fixer-output.txt 2>&1
scripts.phpstan: docker compose run --build --rm composer php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse -c /app/phpstan.neon
scripts.phpstan:debug: docker compose run --build --rm composer php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse -c /app/phpstan.neon /app/fiserv-checkout-for-woocommerce/includes -vvv
scripts.phpcpd: docker compose run --build --rm composer php vendor/bin/phpcpd --exclude vendor .
scripts.phpmd: docker compose run --build --rm composer php vendor/bin/phpmd . text /app/phpmd.xml --exclude vendor
scripts.phpcodesniffer: docker compose run --build --rm composer php vendor/bin/phpcs --standard=/app/phpcs.xml.dist --extensions=php --ignore=vendor .
